neqsim.process.equipment.lng
LNG cargo ageing and transport simulation package.

    Method
    Description
    void
    LNGTankLayeredModel.addLayerOnTop(LNGTankLayer layer)
    Add a new liquid layer on top of existing layers (e.g., heel mixing, new cargo parcel).

    LNGTankLayeredModel.buildFlashSystem(LNGTankLayer layer)
    Build a thermo system for flash calculation from a layer's composition.

    LNGTankLayeredModel.calculateGERG2008Density(LNGTankLayer layer)
    Calculate LNG density using GERG-2008 EOS.
    private double

    Estimate the height of a layer based on its volume and tank geometry.

    LNGTankLayeredModel.estimateLayerSpacing(LNGTankLayer lower, LNGTankLayer upper)
    Estimate the vertical spacing between two layer centres.

    LNGTankLayer.getDensityDifference(LNGTankLayer other)
    Get the density difference with another layer.

    LNGTankLayer.isDenserThan(LNGTankLayer other)
    Check if this layer is denser than another.
